'''James Fielden''' (born 9 May 1978 in [[Halifax, West Yorkshire]]) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer for [[Keighley Cougars]] in [[RFL League 1|National League One]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/jamie-fielden/summary.html|title=Jamie Fielden: Playing Career: Summary|access-date=29 May 2026}}</ref>

James Fielden's position of choice is as a {{rlp|pr}}.

He played for [[London Broncos#1994–2005: Broncos and Super League|London Broncos]] and [[Huddersfield Giants]] in the [[Super League]] and also for [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster Dragons]] and [[Rochdale Hornets]].<ref>{{Cite news|url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/sport2/hi/rugby_league/super_league/2354581.stm|title=Broncos make double signing|date=23 October 2002 |access-date=21 October 2020}}</ref>

He is the older brother of [[Wigan Warriors]] and [[Great Britain national rugby league team|Great Britain]] international [[Stuart Fielden]].
